name: bloob-haus
description: Transform Obsidian markdown vaults into hosted static websites using Eleventy

scripts.dev: SITE_NAME=buffbaby node scripts/assemble-src.js --site=buffbaby && concurrently -n assemble,eleventy -c blue,green "node scripts/watch-themes.js --site=buffbaby" "SITE_NAME=buffbaby npx @11ty/eleventy --serve"
scripts.dev:buffbaby: SITE_NAME=buffbaby node scripts/assemble-src.js --site=buffbaby && concurrently -n assemble,eleventy -c blue,green "node scripts/watch-themes.js --site=buffbaby" "SITE_NAME=buffbaby npx @11ty/eleventy --serve"
scripts.dev:marbles: SITE_NAME=marbles node scripts/assemble-src.js --site=marbles --content-dir=../bloob-haus-marbles && concurrently -n assemble,eleventy -c blue,green "node scripts/watch-themes.js --site=marbles" "SITE_NAME=marbles npx @11ty/eleventy --serve"
